title: SOC 2 Type II Readiness Briefing
summary: Audit window opens September 1. Three control gaps remain in access management and change logging. Legal and engineering leads must close gaps by August 15 to avoid delaying customer-facing certification.
requirements: Enforce MFA for all production system access
Maintain 12-month immutable audit logs for privileged actions
Document and test incident response playbooks quarterly
Complete vendor risk assessments for all sub-processors handling customer data

action_items.title: Deploy centralized SSO with MFA enforcement
Enable tamper-evident logging on production clusters
